历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum ranking for the Physics Category fluctuated from approximately 9543 → 9575 → 10917 → 14392 → 10859, showing an overall trend of rising and then falling; in 2024, there was a significant shift to 14392, and in 2025, it rebounded sharply to 10859, with a fluctuation range of about 3500 places in the last two years, and a baseline of approximately 10859 in 2025; the provincial Physics Category enrollment plan from 2021 to 2025 was 35 → 36 → 39 → 35 → 33, with a reduction to 33 in 2025; the 2026 plan is 33, unchanged from 2025, with no expansion or contraction, having a neutral impact on the competitive landscape.

学校层次与声誉.title: School Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: 985, 211, Double First-Class; the Soft Science main ranking has continuously risen from 100th in 2021 to 79th in 2026, showing a significant improvement in recent years, reflecting the enhancement of the school's comprehensive strength and increased attractiveness to candidates; the school has not been included in reputation evaluation data from 2021 to 2026, indicating no major reputation incidents and overall stable reputation; Douyin popularity ranks 80th overall, rated as 'average', with short video platform exposure at a moderate level and no obvious popularity signals; no record of enrollment gaps; Ethnology A+ (top in the country), Chinese Language and Literature A-, Sociology A-, totaling 3 A- and above disciplines; Ethnology is the school's flagship discipline, but among the enrollment majors, only Ethnology is directly related, having limited impact on overall application popularity.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Popular engineering majors such as Computer Science, Electronic Information, and Statistics continue to be highly recommended, strongly attracting Physics Category candidates; in 2026, Chongqing's Physics Category candidates are approximately 129,800 (estimated based on historical proportions), a decrease of about 7% from 139,500 in 2025, which helps alleviate competition; the university is located in Beijing, offering some cross-provincial appeal to candidates from the southwest region.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the 2025 baseline ranking of 10859, the unchanged 2026 enrollment plan, the positive reputation effect from the school's continuous ranking improvement (100→79), the sustained high popularity of Physics Category engineering majors, and the approximately 7% reduction in provincial Physics Category candidates, competition is expected to ease slightly in 2026, with a small forward shift in ranking; the predicted minimum ranking is approximately 10829, with a range of 10329–11329.

major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: Predicted ranking approximately 10829; candidates with rankings in the 10300–11300 range are advised to focus on Tier 2 majors, aim for Tier 1 majors, and use Tier 3 majors as safety options; those with rankings significantly better than 10329 can focus on aiming for popular engineering majors like Computer Science and Electronic Information; those with rankings close to 11329 are advised to prioritize Tier 3 majors to ensure admission.

学校层次与声誉.text: 985, 211, Double First-Class; the Soft Science main ranking has continuously risen from 100th in 2021 to 79th in 2026, reflecting a significant improvement in the school's comprehensive strength and increased attractiveness to candidates; the school was not included in reputation evaluation data from 2021 to 2026, indicating no major reputation incidents and overall stable reputation; Douyin heat ranking is 80th, rated as 'average', with moderate exposure on short video platforms and no obvious heat signals; no record of enrollment gaps; Ethnology A+ (top in the country), Chinese Language and Literature A-, Sociology A-, totaling 3 A- and above disciplines; Ethnology is the school's flagship discipline, and advantageous disciplines such as Chinese Language and Literature and Sociology are highly matched with historical category enrollment majors (Chinese Language and Literature, Sociology, Ethnology, etc.), strongly attracting liberal arts candidates.

预测结论.text: Considering the 2025 baseline ranking of 1953, the 2026 enrollment expansion of 11.4% (39 vs. 35), the positive reputation effect from the school's continuous ranking improvement (100→79), the high match between advantageous disciplines and liberal arts enrollment majors, and the approximately 8% increase in the number of historical category candidates in the province, the expansion rate slightly exceeds the candidate growth rate, leading to a slight easing of competition and a small forward shift in ranking; the predicted minimum ranking is approximately 2072, with a range of 1699–2445.
